hero.title: AI for Marketplace Product Images
hero.subtitle: Transform ordinary product photos into professional sales images using artificial intelligence

samples.title: Professional Images for Marketplaces
samples.subtitle: Create attractive product images with AI in seconds

videos.title: Professional Advertisement Videos
videos.subtitle: Watch professional product videos created with AI

about.title: About Us
about.hero_text: We are a modern platform for creating professional product images and videos using artificial intelligence. Our goal is to make quality visual content accessible to all marketplace sellers, helping them increase sales and save time.
about.mission_text: We create an advanced platform for automatically generating professional product images and videos, helping marketplace sellers increase sales and save time. Our AI technologies make professional visual content accessible to everyone.

analysis.title: AI Product Analysis
analysis.description: We use GPT-4 Vision for deep product analysis and creating personalized design themes.

images.title: Professional Images
images.description: We generate high-quality images using the latest AI models from Google and Stability AI.

optimization.title: Marketplace Optimization
optimization.description: We create images specifically adapted to the requirements of Wildberries, Ozon, Instagram, and Telegram.

speed.title: Fast Generation
speed.description: Get a professional image ready in just 30-60 seconds without manual processing.

sales.title: Increase Sales
sales.description: Attractive AI images help boost conversion and make your product stand out from competitors.

video.title: Video (Coming Soon)
video.description: We're developing a feature to create short promotional videos for your marketplace products.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.step1_desc: Upload a photo of your product and select the target platform (Wildberries, Ozon, etc.)
how_it_works.step2_desc: AI will analyze the product and offer 3 personalized design themes
how_it_works.step3_desc: In 30-60 seconds, receive a professional image ready for placement

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with us to discuss how we can help you on your AI transformation journey. Our experts are ready to meet with you.

form.title: Contact Us
form.toast_success_desc: We will get back to you as soon as possible
